Lighthouse Scores Heatmap

Heatmap of Lighthouse category scores to highlight consistent strengths and weak areas.

Core Web Vitals Analysis

LCP, CLS, and response time compared to recommended thresholds for fast, stable, and responsive pages.

Per-Website Insights

Each card summarizes performance, core vitals, and the top actions to improve reliability and speed.

Data Sources: This section presents a synthesis of key web performance metrics for each site. Performance scores and Lighthouse metrics (including LCP, FCP, CLS, TTFB) are obtained from the Google PageSpeed Insights API. Where available, real-user field data from the Chrome User Experience Report (CrUX) is displayed on each card next to the CrUX label, providing insight into actual user experience in the field. Response time measurements are derived from direct site profiling. For a detailed comparative analysis including raw data, CrUX versus Lighthouse results, accessibility, SEO, and tailored recommendations, please consult the attached Excel report.
